_meta.name: okta-view-system-log
_meta.description: Navigate to the Okta System Log (last 7 days) and read the event table.
anomalies: URL is /report/system_log_2 (not /admin/reports or /admin/security) — note the /report prefix, not /admin/report
Table header first column is empty string '' — likely a status/icon column
Page appends date range, locale, viewport, and zoom params automatically on load
CSV download available via direct href in mainActions: /sage/api/v1/logs/csv?since=...&until=...&q=

chain.note: System log fetches from API — needs slightly longer wait than other pages.

Table headers: ['', 'Time', 'Actor', 'Event Info', 'Targets']. Typically 20-40 rows. mainActions include: Back to Reports, Advanced Filters, Reset Filters, Download CSV (href: /sage/api/v1/logs/csv?...), Show More.

log-table.note: rowCount is typically 40 (20 events + calendar = ~40 effective rows seen by perceive)

csv-download.description: Download current log view as CSV

system-log.description: System log loaded with default 7-day window
